content: Fix lint stage to properly fail on explicit 'any' return types - ESLint should catch this
Fix stages showing as disabled when they are actually enabled in settings.json
Investigate where validation run count data is coming from - should reflect actual runs
Remove 'test-stage' phantom stage - all stages should come from settings.json only
Implement proper run logging and analysis from log files instead of mock data
Create stage management page with reordering, enabling/disabling, and field editing
Create SQLite database schema for task management system
Build task management UI page with CRUD operations for todo-list.json tasks
Implement task management API endpoints with full CRUD functionality
Update validate-todo-list.ts script to use API for checking incomplete tasks
Create comprehensive unit tests for task management system
Build integration tests for task management API endpoints
Implement Playwright E2E tests for task management UI
Add display of 'continue on failure' information for each validation stage
Add stage statistics and history viewing functionality
Add task completion statistics and analytics dashboard
Add BDD scenario linking system for completed tasks
Create BDD scenario execution history tracking and viewing
Build test suite execution history dashboard with overall statistics
Fix font colors on the settings page
Add ability to re-order stages in settings page
Investigate validation run logs storage and fix analytics data display
Add commit message validation in pre-commit check to ensure task ID from todo-list.json
Implement automatic task completion time tracking with codegoat prefix in commit messages
Add automatic duration calculation for completed tasks based on commit timestamps
Create commit message parser to extract task IDs and update todo-list.json automatically
Fix edit and add stage button colors in settings page
Fix input field font colors in edit form (should be black for light theme)
Fix save and cancel button font colors in settings forms
Fix pagination button colors in recent validation runs section
Switch entire app to consistent light theme
Enable all currently disabled validation stages in settings.json
Fix validation issues raised by newly enabled stages one by one
Investigate why settings.json edit permissions don't work - security validation concern
Add line charts for success rate tracking over time in analytics
Add line charts for average duration tracking over time in analytics
Enable unlimited pagination in recent validation runs section
Verify and fix refresh button functionality in analytics page
Re-enable frontend coverage check and fix coverage threshold issues
Re-enable uncommitted files check validation stage
Re-enable todo list validation stage
Fix time series charts to display historical data by day instead of empty charts
Fix pagination dropdown - selecting larger numbers should actually show more items per page
Investigate why validation runs history is limited - should show all past validation runs
Increase frontend coverage threshold to 80% and fix any coverage gaps
Fix Playwright E2E validation stage to properly fail when tests fail
Investigate and fix failing Playwright tests that should be blocking pipeline
Implement file permission enforcement to prevent editing of protected files
Add validation run log viewing - store and display all command outputs and errors
Make validation runs clickable to view detailed logs and stage outputs
